name: aiscope demo — find the 'More information' link
description: Demonstrates the aiscope step type by handing control to an LLM to find and click the 'More information...' link on the public example.com page. The success check verifies the browser has redirected to iana.org.
goal: Navigate to example.com, let the AI find and click the 'More information' link, and confirm the landing URL is on iana.org.

steps.name: Navigate to example.com
steps.description: Explicit starting point — the aiscope step below is scoped to finding and clicking the right link from this page, not to the full navigation.

steps.name: AI: find and click the More information link
steps.description: Hands control to the LLM for a bounded goal-driven sub-run. The LLM observes the page (simplified HTML + viewport screenshot), picks a next action, and PortalFlow dispatches it. The loop exits when the URL contains 'iana.org' (success check), the wall-clock budget expires (60s), or the iteration count is exhausted (10 iterations).

action.goal: Find and click the link labeled 'More information...' on the example.com page. It's the single outbound link visible on the page and it redirects to iana.org.

steps.name: Confirm redirect
steps.description: Purely validates we ended up where the aiscope step said we would. A successful run reaches here; a failed run (budget exhausted or hard error) has already aborted before getting here via the aiscope step's onFailure: abort.
